## Resource

**Name:** [Resource name or section]  
**Link:** [Paste the URL here]  
**Location in README:** [Section name, or link to the line]

## Issue

- [ ] Link is broken or unreachable
- [ ] Description is inaccurate or outdated
- [ ] Resource no longer exists or has moved
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Details

[Describe the issue clearly. If it's a broken link, what do you see when you try to access it? If the description is inaccurate, what should it say instead?]

## Suggested Fix (optional)

[If you have a replacement link or corrected description, please share it here.]
